description: PERMANENT model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.
approvalContext: CHG-0660: TKT-0540 model-policy tier map confirmed: T2 Governance, T2 Backend, T3 Technical, T3 Business, userFacing.

userFacing.description: Agents that interact directly with humans (Ken, Angie) via webchat or Telegram.
userFacing.rationale: CHG-0621 + CHG-0660: Yoda/Aria strong tier on kimi-k2.7-code. Yoda has no Execute phase (CHG-0545); Aria Synthesize may use cheap at per-atom discretion.

t2Governance.description: T2 governance/verdict agents: Shield, Lex, Warden, Sage.
t2Governance.rationale: CHG-0660: Split governance agents into own tier. Strong = gemma4:31b-cloud; cheap available for rare Execute/Synthesize work.

t2Backend.description: T2 design-only/backend specialists: Atlas, Thrawn, Lando, Mon Mothma.
t2Backend.rationale: CHG-0660: T2 backend tier split from governance. Strong = deepseek-v4-pro. Execute/Synthesize produce documents/diagrams/analysis and use cheap model.

t3Technical.rationale: CHG-0660: T3 technical stream reduced to Forge only. Strong = minimax-m3. Forge exception: Plan/Synthesize use cheap; Verify/Replan use strong.

t3Business.description: T3 business specialists: Spark, Ahsoka, Luthen.
t3Business.rationale: CHG-0660: Business stream on kimi-k2.6. Spark high-stakes Execute may override to strong. Ahsoka/Luthen moved from t3Technical.

trialMiniMaxM3.description: CHG-0498: TERMINATED. Kept as empty archival tier.
trialMiniMaxM3.rationale: CHG-0596: Trial terminated. minimax now lives in t3Technical only.

higherQuality.description: Anthropic higher-quality tier. Parked per CHG-0502.
higherQuality.rationale: CHG-0500/CHG-0502: Tier exists structurally but Anthropic is permanently parked until 'CLAUDE ACTIVATE'.

main.modelChangeNote: CHG-0660: Tier reassignment per TKT-0540 confirmed policy.

cronModelPolicy.description: All isolated agentTurn crons use gemma4:31b-cloud with kimi fallback. Exception: Morning Stand-Up uses kimi primary (Ken-approved).

kimiPolicy.allowedUse: standup + email cron + routine single-thread background non-interactive tasks only
kimiPolicy.prohibitedUse: complex orchestration, multi-ticket routing, state tracking, CHG decisions

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.

crestPhaseModelMap.description: CREST v1.2 §5.8 — Per-agent, per-phase model assignments. Warden uses this for phase-aware compliance (TKT-0383).

pro.label: Plan / Verify / Replan
pro.fallbackRule: Retry pro → kimi. Never degrade pro → flash.

flash.label: Execute / Synthesize
flash.fallbackRule: Flash → pro escalation. Cheap → expensive, not cheap → cheaper.

_note: CREST phase model assignments added per TKT-0383. Forge flash-for-Plan is intentional — do not flag as violation.
_note_previous: This is a clean v2.0 rebuild. All interim flags, Anthropic model references, and stale policy fields removed. Anthropic models (sonnet, haiku, opus) are NOT currently approved or expected on any agent.
note: Resynced agentTiers to match actual openclaw.json agent configs. Per-agent exceptions documented. Allowed fallback chain = [deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] or [gemma4:31b-cloud, deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] depending on agent primary.

crestV13Transition.rationale: CHG-0500: CREST v1.3 + TKT-0368 provide structural guards for risky state manipulation. Anthropic models are no longer a special trigger — they are one option in the model-task matrix alongside Ollama Cloud models. Ken issues CLAUDE RECONFIGURE keyword; Conservative Mode flag lifted.
crestV13Transition.riskFramework: CREST v1.3 (target) + TKT-0368 — Plan→Verify→Replan gates, RVEV cycle, 2-Pass Contract, dispatch-validate.sh, model-task matrix

rollout.phase2_pending: TKT-0368: CREST v1.3 implementation (3-area: execution, token economics, memory)
rollout.phase3_pending: CREST v1.3 doc lock (Atlas + Thrawn review)

lessons.rule: Do not confabulate explanations for behavior changes. If you don't know why something changed, say so. State 'I don't know' instead of constructing a plausible narrative. Especially for model/agent/cost claims — always check the SSOT (model-policy.json, runtime metadata) before stating.
lessons.precedent: L-084 (2026-06-12): same class, model (self) fabricated 31 CHG records in a compacted summary, claimed 'sweep complete'. Permanent rule: never claim completion from a summary. Always re-run gate after context boundary.

crestPhaseOverrides.description: CREST phase-aware model overrides. strong=agent's tier primary; cheap=agent's tier cheapModel; none=phase not allowed.
